_comment: Pattern: All stages run in parallel (no dependencies)
_usage: Ask Kiro: 'Compare Redis vs Memcached vs DragonflyDB for caching'
task: Compare caching solutions for our web application

stages.name: redis-research
stages.prompt_template: Research Redis pros, cons, and use cases for {task}

stages.name: memcached-research
stages.prompt_template: Research Memcached pros, cons, and use cases for {task}

stages.name: dragonfly-research
stages.prompt_template: Research DragonflyDB pros, cons, and use cases for {task}
